control_flow.comment: T_ENC is only required at system startup. Subsequent T_SCM (mode change) does NOT require re-issuing T_ENC unless Scale factor updates.

interconnect.description: RegFile Port MUX Connectivity: Group-based Full Mesh
interconnect.comment: Act Group (Slots 0/1) accepts Tiles 0/1. Weight Group (Slots 2/3) accepts Tiles 2/3.

agu_thread_slot_contention.comment: CRITICAL: If an AGU Thread Slot is busy, any new instruction targeting it will be IGNORED by hardware. Compiler MUST track busy cycles.
agu_thread_slot_contention.safe_guard: Compiler must track (Length * Interval) and insert NOPs if needed.

buffers.odb_description: Output Data Buffer depth. Compiler should warn if C_OUT exceeds this without external drain.

timing_model.description: Pipeline latency and safety padding parameters

writeback.desc: CRITICAL: All R-Type instructions (0xxxxx) modify RegFile MUX/Ctrl. MUST strictly enforce 4 cycles (3+1) of NOPs after T_WB sequence before issuing ANY R-Type instruction (R_R, R_CW, R_TWB).

tile_busy_detection.description: Minimum instruction gap between T_SCM and B_SYNC(Wait_Tile) to avoid false idle.
tile_busy_detection.logic: Dependent on the length of the preceding R_R instruction.

single_data.comment: For Length=0 (1 item). Need 2 cycle gap. B_SYNC valid at 3rd instr after T_SCM.

burst_data.comment: For Length>0. Need 1 cycle gap. B_SYNC valid at 2nd instr after T_SCM.

compute_modes.description: Tile Compute Configuration (T_SCM [13:10]). Also defines required AGU data rate (R_R [21:20]).
compute_modes.comment: Compiler usage: Use 'mode_bits' for T_SCM instruction. Use 'agu_mode' for R_R instruction.

SCALE.desc: Post-processing mode. No external data stream needed.
